# back

Go back

## Usage

```bash
agent-device back [--in-app|--system]
```

## Session Requirement

Usually expects an active session.

## Aliases

- None

## Notes

- `back --in-app` is the explicit alias for the default app-owned behavior.

## Allowed Flags

- `--in-app`: Back: use app-provided back UI when available
- `--system`: Back: use system back input or gesture when available

## Platform Coverage

| Target | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| iOS sim | Yes |
| iOS device | Yes |
| tvOS sim | Yes |
| macOS | Yes |
| Android emu | Yes |
| Android device | Yes |
| Android TV | Yes |
